blended.narrative: 49 Degrees North is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,764 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
